governing_note.en: This document is provided in English, the governing language. Any translation is offered for convenience only; if there is a conflict, the English version prevails.

privacy_title.lo: ນະໂຍບາຍຄວາມເປັນສ່ວນຕົວ

privacy_intro.en: How NIIGHTMARE Esports collects, uses, and protects your information — including the data you share when applying for a tryout.
privacy_intro.lo: NIIGHTMARE Esports ເກັບກຳ, ນຳໃຊ້ ແລະ ປົກປ້ອງຂໍ້ມູນຂອງທ່ານແນວໃດ — ລວມທັງຂໍ້ມູນທີ່ທ່ານສົ່ງມາເມື່ອສະໝັກທົດສອບຝີມື.

terms_title.lo: ຂໍ້ກຳນົດການນຳໃຊ້

terms_intro.en: The terms that govern your use of the NIIGHTMARE Esports website, our intellectual property, and any submissions you make.
terms_intro.lo: ຂໍ້ກຳນົດທີ່ຄວບຄຸມການນຳໃຊ້ເວັບໄຊ້ NIIGHTMARE Esports, ຊັບສິນທາງປັນຍາຂອງພວກເຮົາ ແລະ ການສົ່ງຂໍ້ມູນຕ່າງໆ.
